description.description: Schema file defining the SPJ application's core features: data entry, file uploads, bukti fisik, workshop, dokumen wajib, realisasi dana BOSP, and PR pengadaan.

Frontend blueprint for SPJ app using React + Vite + Tailwind CSS. Defines 9 routes, 8 sidebar menu items, page layouts, component hierarchy, template cards, UI state patterns, and PDF generation approach.
Technology comparison document analyzing options for SPJ app: Supabase Free→Pro, VPS+PostgreSQL, SQLite, Google Apps Script, Electron, File-Based JSON. Recommends Supabase Free Tier for blueprint.
Architecture deployment guide for SPJ app using Laravel + SQLite, modeled after eRapor (local installation). Covers installer flow, database setup, Dapodik integration.
Research document on Dapodik and eRapor architecture patterns, framework comparison, and integration approaches for school financial applications.
Admin-only login with animated split layout. Form validation, loading state, error messages, smooth transition animations.
Data entry for school profile and officials. Supports both manual form and Excel upload.
Upload data profil sekolah and data guru via Excel (.xlsx) files. Drag & drop or browse file upload.
Excel-like BKU transaction table with columns for No, Tanggal, Uraian, Kode Rekening, Debet, Kredit, Saldo, Bukti, Aksi. Sort, filter, auto-calculate saldo.
Main document composition and printing page per BKU transaction. Split view with Card Grid, Document Editor, Document Preview. Footer actions for print and export.
Mandatory documents outside ARKAS. Toggle SIPLAH/non-SIPLAH controls which documents appear.
Realization of BOSP funds with 3 tabs: Cover, Sekat, Alur. Auto-calculate selisih, export per tab to PDF.
Application settings with 4 tabs: Profil Sekolah, Data Master, Backup & Restore, Tentang.
Opening page with school branding, hero section, features section, info section, footer.
Admin-only login page with split layout: left = animated illustration, right = login form.
Main dashboard with stats cards, recent BKU table, document progress bars.
School data input page with Form/Upload tabs for profile and officials.
Teacher and education staff data input page with Form/Upload tabs.
BKU transaction table page with period filter, sort, auto-calculate saldo, print icon.
Dynamic route for document composition per BKU transaction.
Mandatory documents page with SIPLAH toggle and conditional document cards.
Realization page with 3 tabs: Cover, Sekat, Alur.
Settings page with 4 tabs for profile, master data, backup, about.
Landing page components: LandingNavbar, HeroSection, FeaturesSection, InfoSection, Footer.
Login page components: LoginIllustration, LoginForm, AppInfo.
Dashboard components: StatsCards, RecentBKUTable, DocumentProgress.
School data page components: DataSekolahForm, DataSekolahUpload, TabSwitcher.
Teacher data page components: DataGuruForm, DataGuruUpload, DataGuruTable.
BKU table page components: BKUTable, BKUFilter, BKUActions, PrintButton.
Document composition page components: DocumentSidebar, DocumentCard, DocumentEditor, DocumentPreview, PreviewControls, PrintActions, BatchProcessor.
Mandatory documents page components: DokumenCard, UploadDokumen, SiplahToggle.
Realization page components: CoverForm, SekatTable, AlurFlow.
17 document templates for BKU transactions grouped into 7 gradient categories. Each template has card with gradient header, icon, title, sub-type, and action buttons.
6 mandatory document templates outside ARKAS: Dok. PBJ, Register KAS, Berita Acara, Lembar Kritik/Saran, Lembar Pengaduan, Papan BOS.
3 realization document templates: Cover, Sekat, Alur. Tab-based navigation.
React Context / Zustand for lightweight state management. State sections: documents, dokumenWajib, realisasi, ui.
Reusable UI patterns: Empty State, Loading State, Error State, Confirmation Dialog, Toast Notification.
Premium card design system with gradient headers, rounded-2xl shadow, hover effects, status indicators, action buttons. 3 card variants.
Sidebar with 8 menu items: Dashboard, Data Sekolah, Data Guru, BKU, Dokumen SPJ, Dokumen Wajib, Realisasi, Pengaturan.
Physical evidence categories: Honor, Perjalanan Dinas, Mamin, Penggandaan, Cetak Foto, Cetak Banner, Sewa, Pemeliharaan, Tagihan.
